# Time Services

Cloudflare's suite of time services: NTP, NTS, and Roughtime

> Links below point directly to Markdown versions of each page. Any page can also be retrieved as Markdown by sending an `Accept: text/markdown` header to the page's URL without the `index.md` suffix (for example, `curl -H "Accept: text/markdown" https://developers.cloudflare.com/time-services/`).
>
> For other Cloudflare products, see the [Cloudflare documentation directory](https://developers.cloudflare.com/llms.txt).

## Overview

- [Time Services](https://developers.cloudflare.com/time-services/index.md)

## Network Time Protocol

- [Network Time Protocol](https://developers.cloudflare.com/time-services/ntp/index.md): Synchronize clocks using Cloudflare's NTP service.
- [User Guide](https://developers.cloudflare.com/time-services/ntp/usage/index.md): Guide for consuming randomness from drand.

## Network Time Security

- [Network Time Security](https://developers.cloudflare.com/time-services/nts/index.md): Secure time synchronization with NTS protocol.

## Roughtime

- [Roughtime](https://developers.cloudflare.com/time-services/roughtime/index.md): Authenticated time synchronization with Roughtime protocol.
- [Server Deprecation](https://developers.cloudflare.com/time-services/roughtime/deprecation/index.md): Deprecated Roughtime server endpoints and keys.
- [Use Roughtime](https://developers.cloudflare.com/time-services/roughtime/recipes/index.md): Use Roughtime clients in Go, C++, Rust, and Java.
- [Get the Roughtime](https://developers.cloudflare.com/time-services/roughtime/usage/index.md): Connect to Cloudflare's Roughtime server.

## Terms of use

- [Terms of use](https://developers.cloudflare.com/time-services/tos/index.md): Cloudflare Time Services terms of use.
